description_long: This is a circular metallic band with a warm golden hue, featuring an intricate Celtic knotwork pattern that runs continuously along its outer surface. The band is relatively wide, with the knotwork design cut out, creating open spaces within the metal and lending an airy, elegant appearance. The surface is smooth and polished, reflecting light and enhancing the richness of the gold color. The knotwork motif is symmetrical and repeated, giving the piece a sense of unity and tradition. There are no visible gemstones or additional adornments, focusing attention on the craftsmanship of the metalwork. The interior of the band appears hollow, making it lightweight and comfortable for wear.
description: A wide, polished gold band with intricate openwork Celtic knot patterns and a smooth, reflective finish. The design is elegant and traditional, with no gemstones or extra embellishments.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full circular shape and the continuous Celtic knotwork pattern around the band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width of the band and the detailed knotwork cutouts along the surface.
description_view_2: Another top-down view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the openwork and symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the width and repeating knotwork motif.
